endpoints.name: falcor2.bridge.ping
endpoints.title: Ping Falcor2 bridge
endpoints.description: Return a simple liveness response from the selected running Falcor2 bridge.

endpoints.name: falcor2.app.status
endpoints.title: Get Falcor2 app status
endpoints.description: Return lightweight status information for the selected running Falcor2 app.

endpoints.name: falcor2.app.screenshot
endpoints.title: Capture Falcor2 screenshot
endpoints.description: Save the current Falcor2 Editor output texture to an image file and return a local path that can be embedded in chat. MANDATORY PRESENTATION REQUIREMENT: After a successful call, the assistant must include the result in its final response as both (1) a clickable Markdown link using markdown_path and (2) an inline Markdown image using ![Falcor2 screenshot](markdown_path). The assistant must not rely on tool output, commentary, or a collapsible preview to display the image.

path.description: Optional output image path. Relative paths are resolved against the Falcor2 workspace. Defaults to a timestamped PNG in the system temp directory.

endpoints.name: falcor2.offline.python_info
endpoints.title: Get Falcor2 offline Python info
endpoints.description: Run in the resolved Falcor2 Python environment and return lightweight interpreter and workspace context.

endpoints.name: falcor2.offline.render_scene
endpoints.title: Render Falcor2 scene offline
endpoints.description: Load a Falcor2 scene without a running app and render every camera to PNG files. MANDATORY PRESENTATION REQUIREMENT: After a successful call, the assistant must include every returned image in its final response as both (1) a clickable Markdown link using images[].markdown_path and (2) an inline Markdown image using ![<camera_name>](<markdown_path>). The assistant must not rely on tool output, commentary, or a collapsible preview to display the images.

endpoints.name: falcor2.echo
endpoints.title: Echo JSON payload
endpoints.description: Return the JSON payload sent to this endpoint.
